name: Agents Fallback Data
description: Public-safe fallback agent cards for static rendering when a dynamic registry is unavailable.

agents.name: FundReady Copilot
agents.description: Checks funding readiness, explains scorecard tiers, and recommends next-step prep without claiming approvals or final eligibility.
agents.purpose: Help business owners understand readiness inputs, organize prep work, and choose the safest next step.

agents.name: Funding Language Safety Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews funding copy for guarantees, risky promises, private data exposure, and misleading eligibility language.
agents.purpose: Keep public-facing funding language clean and review-safe.
guardrails: Do not preserve claims of guaranteed funding
Do not expose private partner data
